rules.rule_text:
rule RTF_Byte_Nibble_Obfuscation_method1
{
	strings:
		$magic = {7b 5c 72}
		$update = "\\objupdate" nocase
		$data = "\\objdata" nocase
		$nibble_a = /([A-Fa-f0-9]\\'[A-Fa-f0-9]{4}){4}/
		$nibble_b = /(\\'[A-Fa-f0-9]+\\'[A-Fa-f0-9]{4}){4}/

	condition:
		$magic in ( 0 .. 30 ) and all of them and ( #nibble_a > 10 or #nibble_b > 10 )
}
